# Security Policy

If you think you've identified a security issue with *{{ cookiecutter.friendly_name }}*, **do not open a public issue**. Instead, to responsibly disclose a security issue, [report a vulnerability via GitHub's security advisory form](https://github.com/{{ cookiecutter.github_username }}/{{ cookiecutter.project_name }}/security/advisories/new), or report it by email to [{{ cookiecutter.author }}](mailto:{{ cookiecutter.email }}).
